title: RENOIR Special Screening

title_lang.zh_hk: 《印象派女孩》光影虛實特典場

synopsis:
Set in late 1980s Tokyo under bubble economy with deep loneliness, Renoir follows the turbulent life of 11-year-old Fuki. While Fuki’s father is fighting terminal illness, her mother struggles with work and caregiving, estrangement develops between them accordingly. Fuki tries to figure out the complicated adult world and yearns for connection with the help of parapsychology. She places her fear and sorrow in miracles. Through the rising star Yui Suzuki's mesmerizing performance, the film captures the delicate interplay and alienation of relationships. In Competition, Cannes Film Festival.
 

Each ticket includes one set of premium items: an A3 poster and a random PVC card.
cast: Yui Suzuki, Lily Franky, Hikari Ishida, Ayumu Nakajima, Yuumi Kawai, Ryota Bando

cast_lang.en: Yui Suzuki, Lily Franky, Hikari Ishida, Ayumu Nakajima, Yuumi Kawai, Ryota Bando
cast_lang.zh_hk: 鈴木唯、Lily Franky、石田光、中島步、河合優實、坂東龍汰
